filesModified.purpose: Fixed team member card: border-radius, name font size, role font, image padding, content gap, department tag styling
Fixed blog post card: title font size, content area gap
Fixed policy card: border-radius, border color, tag background and border
Fixed resource card: border-radius, border color, hover background, tag background and border
Fixed grid gap: reduced from gap-x-10/gap-y-12 to gap-x-6/gap-y-8

warnings: Asset size warnings (editor.js 309 KiB, screen bundle 341 KiB) - not related to changes

syncStatus.notes: These are PHP-only card templates and block template. No TSX counterparts to sync.

fixesApplied.description: Team member card name heading changed from text-header-4 (24px) to text-header-3 (30px desktop). Closest available token to Figma 40px without oversizing.
Team member card role text changed from General Sans (text-body font-bold italic) to Anton font (text-header-5, 24px). Matches Figma Anton Regular 24px.
Team member image container changed from p-4 pb-0 to p-4 (16px padding on all sides including bottom).
Team member content area gap changed from gap-2 (8px) to gap-6 (24px). Padding changed from p-6 pt-4 to p-6 (uniform).
fixesApplied.change: flex flex-col gap-2 p-6 pt-4 -> flex flex-col gap-6 p-6

fixesApplied.description: Team member card border-radius changed from rounded-2xl (16px) to rounded-3xl (24px), closer to Figma 25px.
Blog post card title changed from text-header-4 (24px) to text-header-3 (30px at desktop). Figma shows 31px, text-header-3 is 30px.
Blog post card content gap changed from gap-2 (8px) to gap-4 (16px).
Policy card border-radius changed from rounded-2xl (16px) to rounded-3xl (24px). Border color changed from border-white/20 to border-off-white (#fbf6e2).
fixesApplied.change: rounded-2xl border border-white/20 -> rounded-3xl border border-off-white

fixesApplied.description: Resource card border-radius changed from rounded-2xl (16px) to rounded-3xl (24px). Border color changed from border-white/20 to border-off-white (#fbf6e2).
fixesApplied.change: rounded-2xl border border-white/20 -> rounded-3xl border border-off-white

fixesApplied.description: Resource card hover background changed from group-hover:bg-accent-lighter (#eeffb5) to group-hover:bg-accent (#d4ff45) for stronger visual match with Figma.
Grid gap reduced from gap-x-10 (40px) gap-y-12 (48px) to gap-x-6 (24px) gap-y-8 (32px). Closer to Figma values of 16-32px column gap and 24-32px row gap across variations.
Team member department tag background changed from bg-charcoal/10 to bg-white/80 with border border-accent added.
Policy card tags changed from bg-accent-light to bg-accent-lighter with border border-accent-light added.
Resource card tags (both audience and resource_type loops) changed from bg-accent-light to bg-accent-lighter with border border-accent-light added.

notes: DQA-001: text-header-3 (30px at desktop via text-3xl) is the closest available token to Figma 40px. text-header-2 (60px at desktop via text-6xl) would be too large. A custom 40px token would need to be added to typography.css if exact match is required.

DQA-013: Used gap-x-6 (24px) and gap-y-8 (32px) as a compromise across all variations. Figma shows Team Members at 16px/24px and Policies at 32px/32px. For exact per-variation gaps, CSS targeting data-post-type would be needed.
